title: Piel en Armonia | Medical dermatology in Quito
description: Medical dermatology in Quito with clear diagnosis, indicated treatment, and follow-up you can actually understand.

slides.title: A strong diagnosis at the start changes the whole course.
slides.description: We listen first, examine skin, hair, and nails, then shape a plan you can understand from the first consultation.

slides.title: Technology enters only when it improves the decision and the outcome.
slides.description: Laser, peels, and biostimulation are chosen by phototype, clinical objective, and follow-up safety, never by impulse.
slides.alt: Dermatology laser platform with medical settings

slides.title: Telemedicine to move early, without deciding blind.
slides.description: We resolve first guidance remotely and move into clinic in Quito when the case demands direct examination.

slides.title: Follow-up turns early improvement into real stability.
slides.description: Every review compares progression, adjusts recommendations, and keeps medical decisions traceable over time.
slides.alt: Integrated skin, hair, and nails follow-up

slides.title: A team that explains each decision without fog.
slides.description: You receive current dermatology judgment, close guidance, and a plan that stays understandable at every stage.

newsStrip.label: First step
newsStrip.headline: Telemedicine and active clinical routes are ready today without relying on a traditional booking page.
newsStrip.detail: While online booking returns, you can start with telemedicine or open the service route that best organizes your case today.

editorial.title: Clear medical judgment for the next step.
editorial.deck: Each block sums up what we see, what we recommend, and how we continue so every decision feels grounded.

cards.title: From first consultation to a full plan
cards.copy: When the skin changes in a recent way, we begin with comprehensive diagnosis and stage-based goals that can actually be followed.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea with steady control
cards.copy: Active inflammation is controlled and relapse is reduced through timely adjustments based on your skin response.

cards.title: Laser with medical settings that can be explained
cards.copy: Energy and frequency are defined by phototype, lesion profile, and tolerance to protect skin through the whole process.

cards.title: Telemedicine when timing matters
cards.copy: You receive early guidance and, when direct examination is needed, rapid escalation into clinic.

cards.title: Pediatric care families can understand
cards.copy: Medical instructions are translated into practical steps for home routines, school days, and caregiver follow-through.
cards.alt: Pediatric dermatology consultation with family support

cards.title: Follow-up that proves real progress
cards.copy: Symptoms, images, and tolerance are compared between visits to keep treatment accurate and durable.

corporateMatrix.title: Clinical units built for real cases
corporateMatrix.deck: Each card explains who the route fits, how care works, and which next step is most useful.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis unit
cards.copy: A complete first reading that defines priorities, risk, and control timing without wasting time.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea program
cards.copy: Phase-based care to reduce flares, stabilize sensitivity, and lower visible relapse.

cards.title: Dermatology laser platform
cards.copy: Laser platforms are indicated by phototype and objective, with medical tuning at every session.

cards.title: Early lesion assessment
cards.copy: Changing lesions are reviewed early so decisions stay timely, documented, and clinically grounded.

cards.title: Remote triage and continuity
cards.copy: Remote orientation defines when online continuity is enough and when a Quito clinic visit should happen.

cards.title: Medical dermoaesthetic support
cards.copy: Medical protocols for texture and firmness with realistic timelines and supervised control.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: If you need to move forward without calling first, open telemedicine or choose the route that best organizes your case today.
